body:
## Release v1.9.0

Bumps `ClimaLand` from v1.8.3 → **v1.9.0** (minor: #1757 removed the exported `make_imp_tendency`/`make_update_jacobian` functions, a breaking API change).

### Changes in this PR
- `Project.toml`: version `1.8.3` → `1.9.0`
- `NEWS.md`: rename `main` → `v1.9.0`; add the previously-missing **Rosetta parameters** entry (#1763)
- Refresh all four tracked Manifests (`.buildkite/` and `docs/`, both Julia 1.10 + 1.12): ClimaLand `1.9.0`, ClimaCore `0.14.53` → `0.14.54`

### Release notes (v1.9.0)
- Add Rosetta-derived spatially varying van Genuchten soil parameters (Montzka et al. 2017) as an option #1763
- Reduce unnecessary computation for sublimation, shortwave radiation, and implicit cache; removal of make_imp_tendency and make_update_jacobian functions #1757
- Add `inversion_nee` artifact (inversion-derived NEE/GPP/ER/Rh, monthly 1°×1°, 2002–2020) and `inversion_nee_dataset_path` accessor #1760
- Make SoilCO2 and O2 implicitly stepped #1752
- Change timestep to 900s from 450s in calibration, longruns and benchmarks; reduce the number of short/default diagnostics #1756

### After merge
Comment `@JuliaRegistrator register` on the **merge commit** to register v1.9.0; TagBot will create the `v1.9.0` tag and GitHub release.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Release v1.9.0
